title: THE BEST Cheez Sauce with White Beans and Cashews
steps: Soak and cook your white beans (skip this step if you're using canned beans)
Soak cashews for 4 hours in room temp water OR if you're short on time put the cashews in HOT water for 1 hour
Chop onion and garlic - saute on medium heat
Add everything to blender and blend it up! Adjust seasoning to taste.
prepTime: Several hours (in order to soak beans and cashews)
notes: This is great on anything to give it umami cheesy flavor. Try drizzling it on cabbage steaks (and add some shiitake mushroom bacon for extra goodness)

ingredients.name: Spices of choice
ingredients.amount: depending on your flavor profile you might want smoked paprika, regular paprika, rosemary, thyme, lemon pepper, red pepper flakes, etc

ingredients.name: Nutritional Yeast
ingredients.amount: a small spoonful - don't overdo it since the flavor will take over
